title: pterocarpus villosus
intro: Pterocarpus villosus, also known as the African Pterocarpus, is a medicinal plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a remedy for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Pterocarpus villosus include teas and infusions made from its roots and leaves, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
